connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.description: Manage issues, pull requests, repositories, and code search across your GitHub organization. Sign in with GitHub on first connect — no token to paste.

connectors.name: Slack
connectors.description: Read channels, post messages, and search your Slack workspace conversations.

fields.label: Bot User OAuth Token
fields.help: From your Slack app's OAuth & Permissions page. Requires channels:read, chat:write, and search:read scopes.

fields.label: Team ID
fields.help: Your Slack workspace Team ID (starts with T).

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.description: Search, read, and update pages and databases in your Notion workspace. Sign in with Notion on first connect — no token to paste.

connectors.name: Figma
connectors.description: Read design context, components, and variables from your Figma files. Sign in with Figma on first connect — no token to paste.

connectors.name: Atlassian
connectors.description: Work with Jira issues and Confluence pages across your Atlassian Cloud site. Sign in with Atlassian on first connect — no token to paste.

connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.description: Read, search, and send email through a connected Gmail account.

fields.label: OAuth Credentials JSON Path
fields.help: Absolute path to the Google Cloud OAuth client credentials file on the runtime host.

connectors.name: Microsoft 365
connectors.description: Access Outlook mail, calendar, OneDrive, and Teams across your Microsoft 365 tenant.

fields.label: Application (client) ID
fields.help: From your Azure AD app registration's Overview page.

fields.label: Directory (tenant) ID
fields.help: From your Azure AD app registration's Overview page.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.help: Create a client secret under Certificates & secrets in your app registration.
